nodes.label: Create an RPCBridge with mocked subprocess and empty config.
_find_aery_binary returns the bundled binary path when it exists.
When bundled binary doesn't exist, falls back to 'aery'.
spawn() launches bundled QGIS runner with port-first contract.
spawn() does NOT pass --provider-file; config comes from agent dir env var.
spawn() removes OPENAI-style env vars and sets AERY_CODING_AGENT_DIR for isolati
spawn() sets AERY_CODING_AGENT_DIR in the child process env.
When aery is not found, error_occurred is emitted.
prompt() sends a prompt command via stdin.
abort() sends abort + abort_bash + abort_retry to fully stop the agent.
shutdown terminates the subprocess and cleans up.
Intentional shutdown should not send a crash/disconnect event to UI.
Thinking events are filtered out by _dispatch_event.
Thinking blocks are stripped from message content.
